race.comment: Absolute lottery. SOMETHING SHINY (5) is far better than recent form suggests. Tricky gate but has good pace and should be charging forward and take catching first try at the mile. TALLEYRAND (8) looks close to a win, having placed in his last two. Raced on speed and found one better last time and should go close again. ZAYYANO (9) has been off his best the last couple but the form prior is good for this. Has been racing in richer company and gets a chance to find some form. BON ICHI (2) wasn't far away last time over 1400m and is another close to a win. First try at the mile and worth keeping safe.
